name: Tandoori Murgh (Tandoori Chicken)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a blend of 1 nutmeg, 1 1/2 tsp green cardamom pods, 4 cinnamon sticks,
1 tbsp whole cloves, 1 tsp peppercorns and 1 tsp cumin seeds.
Skin the chicken, wash and pat dry with paper towel. Make deep cuts on
the surface with a knife.
2. Mince or grate ginger and garlic. Transfer to a small bowl and add the
spices. Mix well, then rub the paste into the chicken and let marinate for
several hours in the refrigerator.
3. Cook chicken on grill or in broiler (30 minutes for legs), basting with
leftover marinade and turning to ensure even cooking.
4. Serve with a dash of lemon juice. Serves: 4-6
